detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.Collect(uint256) (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#97)
	PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.balances (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.Collect(uint256) (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#81-105)
	- PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.Deposit() (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#65-77)
	- PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.balances (PRIVATE_ETH_CELL.sol#9)
